_meta.title: Singapore property decision — regulatory & loan-engine constants
_meta.not_advice: Educational illustration of published rules, not financial or mortgage advice. Verify against MAS / MoneySense / IRAS / HDB before acting.
_meta.stability_note: Core cooling-measure parameters have been stable since 27 Apr 2023 (stamp duty) and 20 Aug 2024 (HDB LTV). Every 2026-dated source treats them as unchanged.
_meta.sources: MAS; MoneySense (retrieved Jul 2026); IRAS / MOF (15 Feb 2023 stamp-duty revision); HDB / MND (20 Aug 2024).

tdsr.note: Total monthly debt obligations must not exceed 55% of gross monthly income. The property instalment in the test is computed at the higher of the 4.0% p.a. medium-term floor or the actual rate. Binding constraint for most private-property buyers.
tdsr.source: MAS (medium-term rate effective 30 Sep 2022; 55% TDSR since 16 Dec 2021)

msr.note: Mortgage Servicing Ratio: housing loan instalment must not exceed 30% of gross monthly income. Applies ON TOP of TDSR for HDB and new ECs; does not apply to private condos or resale ECs past MOP.

ltv.note: Loan-to-value ceilings for bank loans to individuals. The MAX tier applies only if BOTH: loan tenure within the cliff AND borrower age + tenure <= 65 at the end of the loan. Otherwise the REDUCED tier applies and the minimum cash portion rises.

reduction_trigger.note: If tenure exceeds 30y (private) / 25y (HDB) OR the loan runs past age 65, LTV steps down to the reduced tier and first-loan minimum cash rises from 5% to 10%.

hdb_concessionary.note: HDB loan LTV cut 80%->75% on 20 Aug 2024.

tenure_cap_years.note: Absolute maximum loan tenures. Separate from the LTV cliff at 30y/25y/age-65 above. For a borrower of age A wanting full 75% LTV on a private purchase, usable tenure = min(30, 65 - A).

absd.note: Additional Buyer's Stamp Duty, on the higher of price or market value. Index = [1st property, 2nd, 3rd or more]. US nationals, and nationals/PRs of Iceland, Liechtenstein, Norway and Switzerland, are treated as Singapore Citizens under FTAs. Unchanged since 27 Apr 2023.

bsd.note: Buyer's Stamp Duty, residential, effective 15 Feb 2023, on the higher of price or market value. Marginal tiers.

rates.note: Live 3M SORA is scrapeable from the MAS domestic-interest-rates page; package rates have no public feed and are curated here. Refresh at each review.

cpf.note: CPF Ordinary Account pays 2.5% p.a. Cash used for downpayment/instalments has an opportunity cost at least equal to this (and typically the investor's portfolio return). Used in the cash-vs-mortgage module as the CPF hurdle.
